Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 
12 
BENE_STATE_BUYIN_TOT_MONS 
LABEL: 
State Buy-In Coverage Count 
DESCRIPTION: Months of state buy-in. 
LONG NAME: BENE_STATE_BUYIN_TOT_MONS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
0–12 
COMMENT: 
This variable counts the total number of months during the year when the beneficiary premium was 
paid by the state. State
